penalties.description: The marked circle was not fully cut out, visible incomplete section at the end.

reasoning: Lighting was adequate, but the final removal of the circle was not shown clearly, resulting in an incomplete circle penalty. No significant line deviation detected, however, final completion status cannot be fully confirmed, lowering confidence.
